title: SKOS Collection
description: JSON Schema for SKOS Collection and OrderedCollection in JSON-LD form. A Collection is a meaningful grouping of concepts; an OrderedCollection preserves member ordering via the JSON-LD @list construct. Based on the W3C SKOS Reference (https://www.w3.org/TR/skos-reference/).

anyOf.description: A SKOS Collection -- a meaningful grouping of concepts. Disjoint with Concept and ConceptScheme.

@context.description: JSON-LD context declaring the skos namespace prefix.

skos:prefLabel.description: Preferred lexical label for this collection.

items.description: An RDF literal value with a language tag, serialized as a JSON-LD value object.

@language.description: BCP 47 language tag (e.g. en, fr, de).

anyOf.description: An RDF literal value with a language tag, serialized as a JSON-LD value object.

@language.description: BCP 47 language tag (e.g. en, fr, de).

skos:definition.description: Formal explanation of the purpose of this collection.

anyOf.description: An RDF literal value with a language tag, serialized as a JSON-LD value object.

@language.description: BCP 47 language tag (e.g. en, fr, de).

anyOf.description: An RDF literal value with a language tag, serialized as a JSON-LD value object.

@language.description: BCP 47 language tag (e.g. en, fr, de).

skos:member.description: Members of this collection (concepts or nested collections, inline or by @id reference).

anyOf.title: SKOS Concept
anyOf.description: JSON Schema for a SKOS Concept in JSON-LD form. A unit of thought within a concept scheme. Supports labels (prefLabel, altLabel, hiddenLabel), notations, hierarchical relations (broader/narrower), associative relations (related), cross-scheme mapping properties, scheme membership, and documentary notes. Based on the W3C SKOS Reference (https://www.w3.org/TR/skos-reference/).

@context.description: JSON-LD context declaring the skos namespace prefix. May be a single object or an array of strings and objects.

skos:prefLabel.description: Preferred lexical label for this concept. A single string, a single language-tagged value, or an array of language-tagged values. Each language should appear at most once.

anyOf.description: An RDF literal value with a language tag, serialized as a JSON-LD value object.

@language.description: BCP 47 language tag (e.g. en, fr, de).

items.description: An RDF literal value with a language tag, serialized as a JSON-LD value object.

@language.description: BCP 47 language tag (e.g. en, fr, de).

anyOf.description: A SKOS OrderedCollection -- concepts where both grouping and ordering are meaningful. Subclass of Collection. Uses JSON-LD @list for the member list.

@context.description: JSON-LD context declaring the skos namespace prefix.

@id.description: URI identifier for this ordered collection.

skos:prefLabel.description: Preferred lexical label for this ordered collection.

items.description: An RDF literal value with a language tag, serialized as a JSON-LD value object.

@language.description: BCP 47 language tag (e.g. en, fr, de).

@language.description: BCP 47 language tag (e.g. en, fr, de).

skos:notation.description: Classification code for this ordered collection.

skos:memberList.description: Ordered list of members using JSON-LD @list construct.
